output_header_comments.get_tid: 01 01 00 02 00 00 -> mctp msg type, pldm instance id, pldm type, GetTID command code, CompletionCode, payload (1 byte, TID = 0)
output_header_comments.set_tid: 01 01 00 01 00 -> mctp msg type, pldm instance id, pldm type, SetTID command code, CompletionCode
output_header_comments.get_pldm_types:
01 01 00 04 00 -> mctp msg type, pldm instance id, pldm type, GetPLDMTypes command code, CompletionCode
05 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 -> payload (8 bytes, bit 0 & 2 set, PLDM type 0 & 2 supported)
output_header_comments.get_pldm_version:
01 01 00 03 00 -> mctp msg type, pldm instance id, pldm type, GetPLDMVersion command code, CompletionCode
00 00 00 00 -> Next data transfer handle, 4 bytes
05 -> TransferFlag, StartAndEnd
f1 f1 f0 00 -> PLDM Type 0 version (pldm base)
84 56 24 bf -> ?
output_header_comments.get_pldm_commands:
01 01 00 05 00 -> mctp msg type, pldm instance id, pldm type, GetPLDMCommands command code, CompletionCode
Type 0:
3e -> Payload, 0011 1110b, bit set for supported command codes, 10 commands supported for pldm type 0
Type 2:
38 2c 03 00 03 .... 03 -> Payload, bit set for supported command codes, 17 commands supported for pldm type 2 (PDR + Platform Events + num & state sensors & effecters)
